reviews.review_description: I would just recommend to be able to pick basketballs up with the grip
Basketball physics are decent. Could use more depth otherwise great way to kill time playing. Hope it gets more update in the future

developer_response.body: thank you for your comments dear

reviews.review_description: Very bad physics and the basketballs are evan an oval shape.I can get a free basketball game with better physics and graphics

developer_response.body: we are working on the graphics and the physics, please wait for the update

reviews.review_description:
Nice little game for short burst fun.  
Nothing groundbreaking and modes are limited but does exactly what it sets out to do.

developer_response.body: thank you for your comments, we will add new mode to the future update
